office_does: The county commission sets county policy, adopts the budget, and oversees county services and operations.
race_blurb: Four candidates with municipal, school-board, agricultural, business, and consulting backgrounds are seeking the District 3 commission seat.

candidates.summary: Flynn is Royal City's finance director and emphasizes infrastructure, public safety, tax stewardship, economic partnerships, and streamlined permitting.
highlights: Serves as Royal City's finance director [S1].
Emphasizes tax stewardship and streamlined planning and building permits [S1].

taxes.basis: Her platform expressly emphasizes tax stewardship.

spending.basis: Tax stewardship and a finance-administration background support a modest restraint and oversight direction.

housing.basis: She calls for streamlining planning and building permits.

experience.basis: She has relevant municipal finance experience but no documented county-commission tenure.

candidates.summary: Raap operates a family farm and cattle business; the approved dossier contains no sufficiently detailed current platform.
highlights: Operates a family farm and cattle business in rural Ephrata [S1].

experience.basis: The dossier documents a private agricultural-business background and no prior public-office record.

candidates.summary: Weeks is a horticulturist and school-board director; the approved dossier contains no sufficiently detailed current platform.
highlights: Works as a horticulturist and serves on the Wahluke School Board [S1].

experience.basis: He has elected school-board experience but no documented county-commission tenure.

candidates.summary: Durfee is an administrative-services consultant and school-board member with agricultural and food-business quality-management experience.
highlights: Has consulting, school-board, and private-sector quality-management experience [S1].

experience.basis: She has school-board and administrative experience but no documented county-commission tenure.
